title: among the stars ...
content:
!/gallery/me_myself/dad.jpg!

dad .. even though you're not around to travel the world anymore, i'm sure that you're enjoying your trip among the stars.  %(me)aliens do really exist, rite dad?%  when i was young, i always stayed up late on the day you returned from the trip - waiting by the front door.

it's been almost 3 years, i guess you're not coming back this time. but i know you'll be okay, god will take good care of you.

miss you dad .. the house has never been the same without you.
